title: carduus nutans subsp. perspinosus
intro: Carduus nutans subsp. perspinosus, also known as the Prickly Thistle, is a subspecies of thistle plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Carduus nutans subsp. perspinosus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
